instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. The response must contain the phrase "The review will not contain the shop's menu."
response: Stepping into this coffee shop, one immediately feels welcomed by its warm and inviting atmosphere. The space is designed to be cozy, featuring soft lighting and comfortable seating areas perfect for reading or working quietly. Behind the counter, the staff offers friendly and attentive service that makes every visitor feel truly valued and appreciated during their stay. While The review will not contain the shop's menu, the aroma of freshly brewed beans hints at an extensive selection of delicious drinks and pastries available for purchase today. The ambiance remains consistent throughout the day, maintaining a peaceful vibe even during busy morning rushes when many locals gather to start their workweek. Each corner of the establishment has been thoughtfully decorated with local art and plants that add a touch of nature indoors. The team works efficiently yet warmly, ensuring orders are prepared quickly without sacrificing quality or personal interaction with guests. This new venue truly stands out as a delightful addition to the neighborhood. I highly recommend visiting this place soon to experience its charm firsthand.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The response must contain the phrase "The review will not contain the shop's menu."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Your review must cover the shop's menu.
